items.title: Nasdaq Hits Fresh Highs After AMD Earnings. The Dot-Com Bubble Parallels Keep Popping Up.
items.summary: Fresh off a record close on Tuesday, the Nasdaq was soaring to fresh highs on Wednesday after Advanced Micro Devices’ earnings report kept the chip rally rolling.  The Dow was up 461 points, or 0.9%.  The S&P and Nasdaq only need to close above yesterday’s level to establish new record closing highs.
